name: Self-hosted homelab on K3s
description: Four-node K3s cluster on commodity hardware sitting at home. Hands-on with the full delivery path — packaging, deployment, networking, observability — for the services I actually use, including this site.

name: Sonatype Maven Central Publisher
description: Open-source Gradle plugin I authored and maintain on the official Plugin Portal. Publishes JVM artefacts to Maven Central through Sonatype's Central Portal API. Demo projects: github.com/ani2fun/plugin-demo.

name: Cortex
description: An interactive, runnable computer-science knowledge base — data-structures, algorithms and system-design books with KaTeX math, mermaid/D2 diagrams, D3 visualisers, and code blocks you can edit and run in-browser against a self-hosted go-judge sandbox. Carved out of this portfolio's old monorepo into its own Scala 3 app: Scala.js + scalajs-react frontend, ZIO 2 + zio-http backend over Postgres, Redis, and Mongo. Lives at cortex.kakde.eu, deployed to the homelab cluster.

name: Portfolio App
description: You're looking at it. kakde.eu is a fully static Scala portfolio — Scala.js + scalajs-react on the frontend, Tailwind v4 for styling, bundled with Vite. A trivial zio-http server serves the compiled bundle plus a health check; the interactive Cortex it used to ship with now lives at cortex.kakde.eu. Packaged as a container and deployed to my homelab K3s cluster.
